title: DeprecatedAppRegistry
content:
# DeprecatedAppRegistry

Inherits from: ApiServiceModel


## Methods


### create_legacy_app(data: Optional[Union[requests.LegacyAppCreate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.LegacyAppCreate

Create a new App or App Version in the App Registry. A new version will be automatically appended if the App already exists.


### list_legacy_app_registry_apps(type: Optional[Sequence[str]], search: Optional[Sequence[str]], pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[responses.LegacyAppItem], responses.LegacyAppRegistryAppsListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Apps in the App Registry and its parameters. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### delete_legacy_app(app_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently delete all versions of an App in the App Registry. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.


### get_legacy_app_registry_app(app_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.LegacyAppRegistryAppGet

Retrieve the parameters of an App in the App Registry.


### update_legacy_app(app_name: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.LegacyAppUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.LegacyAppUpdate

Update an existing App with a new 'title' and/or 'description'. Any parameters that are not provided will remain unchanged.


### delete_legacy_app_version(app_name: str, app_version: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently one version of an App in the App Registry. All other versions of an App will remain unaffected. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.


### get_legacy_app_version(app_name: str, app_version: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.LegacyAppVersionGet

Retrieve the parameters of a specific version of an App in the App Registry.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.client.api.deprecated_app_registry.create_legacy_app()
